name: Orzo with Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Plus 2 tablespoons fat-free canned chicken stock
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a pot with 2 to 3 quarts of water on the stove and bring it to a boil for cooking the orzo.
2. Cut sun-dried tomatoes into small pieces and place them in a bowl.
3. Pour boiling water over the sun-dried tomatoes and let sit for 5 minutes.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of chicken stock in a nonstick pan and sauté for 1 minute.
5. Drain the sun-dried tomatoes, then add them along with the remaining chicken stock to the pan with mushrooms. Raise the heat and reduce the liquid by half.
6. When the water for cooking the orzo comes to a boil, add the orzo and cook for 10 minutes, draining any excess liquid.
7. In a serving bowl, toss the cooked orzo with the vegetable mixture. Sprinkle with chopped basil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
